notes: Day 19 (Mar 18) FINAL UPDATE 12:15AM ET. Sources: CNN live, AJ D19, CNBC, Bloomberg, NPR, Euronews, Wikipedia, Hengaw 5th report, CNBC Ras Laffan x2, Times of Israel, IAEA, Rosatom, IMO.

RAS LAFFAN STRUCK TWICE: Iran ballistic missiles hit Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG complex TWICE on D19. 1st strike: extensive damage. 2nd strike: 'sizeable fires and extensive further damage' (QatarEnergy). No casualties. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches (persona non grata, 24h). World's largest LNG facility (~20% global).

BUSHEHR NUCLEAR PLANT HIT: 'Hostile projectile' struck Bushehr NPP site. IAEA: no reactor damage, no casualties. Rosatom SUSPENDED construction on new units, evacuated non-essential staff. IAEA Grossi: war cannot eliminate nuclear program. Bushehr Airport also struck — Iran Air A319 destroyed on tarmac.

ENERGY WAR MUTUAL: Israel struck South Pars + refineries (AM). Iran retaliated hitting Ras Laffan x2 + threatened Saudi/UAE/Qatar energy sites by name (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Abu Dhabi shut Habshan gas. Both sides destroying each other's energy production.
5TH SENIOR KILL: Basij head killed. Khatib (intel minister) + Basij head + Larijani + Soleimani in ~60h. Katz: open kill order on ALL senior officials.

HENGAW 5TH REPORT: 5,300 total killed (4,789 military + 511 civilians incl 120 minors + 160 women). Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. HRANA: 3,114 dead by D18 (1,354 civilians, 1,138 military, 622 unclassified).
OIL $107: Brent settled $107.38 (CNBC close), spiked $111.23 after-hours on 2nd Ras Laffan. WTI $96.32 close. Gas $3.84 (+29%), $4+ in 7 states, $5+ in CA/HI/WA. Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+.

DIPLOMATIC SURGE: 12 Arab/Islamic FM joint statement demanding Iran halt attacks. E3 (UK/France/Germany) backing 'proportionate military defensive measures.' Saudi FM: 'right to military action.' Qatar expelled attaches. Kataib Hezbollah offered conditional 5-day pause on US Embassy attacks.

HORMUZ: 8 vessels Monday (~double recent). China-linked vessels transiting. IMO emergency meeting — proposed safe maritime corridor for stranded ships. Total traffic ↓97%. 21 tankers since D1 vs 100+/day pre-war.

theoryBox: Day 19 FINAL — NUCLEAR + ENERGY WAR: Both sides targeting energy production. Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE — world's largest LNG facility (~20% global). Bushehr nuclear plant hit by 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). Iran named specific Gulf energy targets. 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Kataib Hezbollah conditional 5-day pause. Brent $107 close. 5 senior officials killed ~60h. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. War entering nuclear-adjacent phase.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۱۹ نهایی — هسته‌ای + جنگ انرژی: پارس جنوبی + راس لفان ۲ بار. بوشهر هسته‌ای پرتابه خورد (IAEA: بدون آسیب). روس‌اتم ساخت متوقف. ایران اهداف انرژی نام برد. ۱۲ وزیر بیانیه. E3 حمایت نظامی. حزب‌الله کتائب مهلت مشروط. نفت ۱۰۷. ۵ مقام. هنگاو ۵,۳۰۰.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: NUCLEAR + ENERGY WAR. South Pars + Ras Laffan x2 + Bushehr NPP. Oil $107. 5 officials killed ~60h. E3 backing defense. 12 FM statement.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: Ras Laffan hit TWICE (8 missiles total at Qatar). Kuwait 4 ballistic. Saudi 4 ballistic (Riyadh). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr at Israel.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: Kuwait 20 drones intercepted. Gulf-wide barrage. Iran issued evacuation warnings + named specific energy targets by name.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: Settled $107.38 (CNBC close). Spiked $111+ after-hours on 2nd Ras Laffan. WTI $96.32. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Up ~40% since D1.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: Hengaw 5th report: 4,789 military + 511 civilians (120 minors, 160 women). HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: IDF ground ops south of Litani expanding. Expects 3+ more weeks. ~1M displaced (19% population). Hezbollah facing public anger from own base.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: 2 killed Ramat Gan cluster munitions. 3,727+ wounded (AJ tracker). Multi-warhead + cluster missiles over Tel Aviv.

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: Bushehr NPP projectile hit. Rosatom suspended construction. IAEA: can't eliminate program. Natanz inaccessible. Isfahan enrichment status unknown.

metrics_fa.label: روز
metrics_fa.desc: هسته‌ای + انرژی. پارس جنوبی + راس لفان ۲ بار + بوشهر. نفت ۱۰۷. ۵ مقام. E3 + ۱۲ وزیر.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: راس لفان ۲ بار (۸ موشک قطر). کویت ۴ بالستیک. ریاض. چندکلاهکی.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد
metrics_fa.desc: کویت ۲۰ پهپاد. هشدار تخلیه + نام بردن اهداف انرژی.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: بسته شدن ۱۰۷.۳۸. جهش ۱۱۱+ بعد ساعت. WTI ۹۶.۳۲. +۴۰٪ از D1.

metrics_fa.label: کشته ایران
metrics_fa.desc: هنگاو: ۴,۷۸۹ نظامی + ۵۱۱ غیرنظامی. HRANA: ۳,۱۱۴. وزارت بهداشت: ۱,۴۴۴.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: عملیات زمینی جنوب لیطانی. ۳+ هفته دیگر. ۱ میلیون آواره. حزب‌الله زیر فشار.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: بوشهر پرتابه خورد. روس‌اتم متوقف. IAEA: نمی‌توان حذف کرد. نطنز غیرقابل‌دسترس.

sitrep: RAS LAFFAN LNG HIT TWICE: Iran ballistic missiles struck Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City TWICE on D19. 1st strike: 'extensive damage' (5 missiles, 4 intercepted, 1 hit). 2nd strike: 'sizeable fires and extensive further damage' (QatarEnergy). No casualties. Qatar expelled Iranian military/security attaches. World's largest LNG facility (~20% global supply). Energy war FULLY MUTUAL — South Pars (AM) + Ras Laffan x2 (PM).

BUSHEHR NUCLEAR PLANT STRUCK: Iran's Atomic Energy Org reported 'hostile projectile' hit Bushehr NPP site. IAEA: no reactor damage, no casualties. Rosatom SUSPENDED construction on new units, evacuated non-essential staff due to 'loss of communication.' IAEA Grossi: war 'cannot entirely eliminate' nuclear program. Isfahan enrichment facility status UNKNOWN. Bushehr Airport also struck — Iran Air A319 destroyed on tarmac. Nuclear risk now ELEVATED.

SAUDI WARNS MILITARY ACTION + 12 FM STATEMENT: Saudi FM Prince Faisal: 'reserved right to military action.' 12 Arab/Islamic FMs issued joint statement demanding Iran 'immediately halt attacks.' Iran targeted Riyadh with ballistic missile DURING emergency FM meeting — intercepted over Prince Sultan Air Base. Saudi intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + drone attack on eastern gas facility.

E3 MILITARY BACKING + KATAIB HEZBOLLAH PAUSE: UK/France/Germany resolved to back 'proportionate military defensive measures' against Iranian drones and ballistic missiles — potential direct European involvement. Kataib Hezbollah offered conditional 5-day pause on US Embassy Baghdad attacks — if US/Israel meet conditions, otherwise 'intensified' attacks.

5TH SENIOR KILL: Israel killed Basij head + intel minister Khatib + Larijani + Soleimani in ~60h. Katz: open kill order on ALL senior officials. DNI Gabbard: regime 'largely degraded' but 'intact.' Iran: 'structure doesn't depend on any single individual.'

OIL $107 + ECONOMIC SHOCK: Brent settled $107.38 (CNBC close), spiked $111+ after-hours on 2nd Ras Laffan. WTI $96.32. Crude up ~40% since D1, ~80% over conflict arc. Gas $3.84 (+29%), $4+ in 7 states. Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+ war budget. Iran listed specific Gulf targets by name: Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.

HENGAW 5TH REPORT: 5,300 killed in Iran (4,789 military + 511 civilians incl 120 minors, 160 women). HRANA: 3,114 dead (1,354 civilians, 1,138 military, 622 unclassified). Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck. Military relocating into civilian spaces.

HORMUZ + IMO: Traffic ↓97% — 21 tankers since D1 vs 100+/day pre-war. 8 vessels Monday (~double recent). China-linked vessels transiting via Iranian territorial waters. IMO emergency meeting — proposed safe maritime corridor resolution for 150+ stranded ships. Major carriers (Maersk, MSC, Hapag-Lloyd, CMA CGM) all suspended.

LEBANON: IDF ground ops expanding south of Litani. 880+ killed (Lebanese Health Ministry). ~1M displaced (19% population). IDF expects 3+ more weeks of ops. Hezbollah facing anger from own Shiite base (WaPo). Lebanese gov ready for direct ceasefire talks without preconditions.
sitrep_fa: راس لفان ۲ بار: موشک بالستیک ایران ۲ بار. آسیب گسترده + آتش‌سوزی. قطر وابستگان اخراج. بزرگترین LNG جهان.
بوشهر هسته‌ای: پرتابه. IAEA: بدون آسیب. روس‌اتم متوقف. گروسی: نمی‌توان حذف. فرودگاه بوشهر + A319 تخریب.
عربستان + ۱۲ وزیر: حق اقدام نظامی. بیانیه مشترک: متوقف کنید. ریاض هدف حین جلسه.
E3 + کتائب: اروپا حمایت نظامی. کتائب مهلت ۵ روزه مشروط.
۵ مقام ~۶۰ ساعت: بسیج + خطیب + لاریجانی + سلیمانی. دستور کشتار باز.
نفت ۱۰۷: بسته ۱۰۷.۳۸. جهش ۱۱۱+. +۴۰٪. بنزین +۲۹٪. ایران اهداف نام برد.
هنگاو ۵: ۵,۳۰۰ کشته. HRANA: ۳,۱۱۴. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان. نظامی در مدارس.
هرمز + IMO: ↓۹۷٪. ۸ کشتی دوشنبه. چین عبور. IMO جلسه اضطراری. کریدور امن.
لبنان: عملیات زمینی. ۸۸۰+ کشته. ۱ میلیون آواره. ۳+ هفته. آمادگی مذاکره مستقیم.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D19: fragment est. D19 REVISED UP: Ras Laffan struck TWICE (8 missiles at Qatar). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Saudi 4 ballistic Riyadh + drone at gas facility. Multi-warhead at Israel. Bushehr projectile.

oil.note: Full daily series. CNBC/Investing.com confirmed where noted. D8: Investing.com 52w high = $119.50. D19 REVISED: Brent settled $107.38 (CNBC close), spiked $111.23 after-hours on 2nd Ras Laffan strike. WTI settled $96.32. Crude up ~40% since D1. Fortune AM: $108.28. Spot $107.12 (up 6.07%). Markets closed regular hours Sun Mar 16.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 18 (D19) FINAL. Ras Laffan hit TWICE. Bushehr NPP projectile. Riyadh ballistic during FM meeting. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Saudi drone at gas facility. Israel multi-warhead + cluster. Habshan shut. Baghdad.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: ENERGY + NUCLEAR DIMENSION — Ras Laffan hit TWICE + South Pars + Bushehr NPP projectile. Rosatom suspended. Iran naming specific Gulf targets. E3 backing military defense. 12 FM statement. Saudi warns military action. Oil $107. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause = first proxy crack. IMO corridor proposal. Next 48-72h: does Iran follow through on Gulf energy threats? Does Saudi act?

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: If mutual energy targeting continues, oil hits $120-130+. Bushehr NPP becomes red line for Russia — Rosatom suspension could strain Iran-Russia relations. Saudi entry as belligerent = OPEC fracture. E3 military involvement = NATO-adjacent escalation. SPR drawdowns accelerate. Gas $4.50+ nationally. Lebanon ceasefire talks could produce first diplomatic win.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Pentagon $200B+ budget = planning for sustained ops. But $107+ oil and mutual energy destruction is economically suicidal. Gulf states + E3 may force ceasefire. Nuclear dimension (Bushehr, unknown Isfahan status) keeps IAEA engaged. Lebanon ground ops likely culminating. Iran military in civilian spaces = grinding urban phase.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If no deal, regional economy in depression. Qatar LNG disruption hits Europe (winter planning). Ras Laffan repair timeline becomes critical. OPEC+ paralyzed. Nuclear program status becomes central negotiation issue. Frozen conflict most likely IF energy war de-escalates.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: Saudi military entry (transforms war). Bushehr NPP escalation (Russia red line). E3 military involvement (NATO). Mojtaba Khamenei appearance (legitimacy). Houthi Red Sea (2nd chokepoint). Ras Laffan repair timeline. China leverage (Xi summit delayed). Kataib Hezbollah pause (proxy fracture). IMO corridor (shipping). US gas at $4+ in 7 states.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: انرژی + هسته‌ای. راس لفان ۲ بار + بوشهر. روس‌اتم متوقف. E3 حمایت. ۱۲ وزیر. عربستان. کتائب مهلت = اولین شکاف. IMO کریدور.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: ادامه انرژی = نفت ۱۲۰-۱۳۰. بوشهر خط قرمز روسیه. ورود عربستان = شکاف اوپک. E3 = ناتو. لبنان مذاکره.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. تخریب متقابل خودکشی. خلیج + E3 آتش‌بس اجباری؟ هسته‌ای: IAEA. لبنان: اوج عملیات.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: بدون توافق = رکود. قطر LNG = اروپا. تعمیر راس لفان. هسته‌ای محور مذاکره. منجمد.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: عربستان. بوشهر (روسیه). E3 (ناتو). مجتبی. حوثی. راس لفان. چین. کتائب (شکاف). IMO. بنزین ۴+.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: LEADING. Bushehr NPP projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan hit TWICE. Iran naming specific Gulf targets. E3 backing 'proportionate military defensive measures' = potential European involvement. Saudi FM: 'military action.' 12 FM joint statement. Pentagon $200B+. Escalation ladder nearly exhausted — nuclear threshold is only step remaining. Multiple new parties being drawn in (E3, Saudi potentially). Classic spiral with MORE actors and FEWER off-ramps than 24h ago.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED. Mutual energy targeting + Bushehr strike make sustained low-intensity nearly impossible. But Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause = first proxy crack. If proxies fracture and energy targeting stabilizes, could revert. IMO corridor could enable partial economic normalization. Iran's missile count ticked UP on D19 (40, highest since D10) — rationing theory from D16 gaining credibility.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: Stable. E3 + 12 FM statement = international pressure for resolution. Kataib Hezbollah pause = political cover for 'mission accomplished.' Lebanon direct talks offer = potential first win. But Bushehr NPP + $107 oil + Saudi warning complicate clean exit narrative.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture
scenarioProbabilities.body: Stable. 5 senior officials killed ~60h. Open kill order. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Northern Iran now struck. But Kataib Hezbollah pause = proxy maintaining autonomy, not collapsing. DNI Gabbard: 'intact.' IRGC operating autonomously. Military relocating to civilian spaces = adaptation. Iran missile count UP on D19 suggests operational capability persists.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 7%. E3 backing military measures is most significant. 12 FM joint statement = broadest Arab consensus. IMO corridor proposal = institutional mobilization. Macron infrastructure moratorium. Lebanon direct talks without preconditions. Bushehr NPP could trigger Russia diplomatic pressure. More actors pushing for resolution than at any point since D1.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: Low but Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause = first signal from proxy. Iran allowing 8 Hormuz vessels = backdoor signaling. Lebanon talks offer. IMO corridor could become framework for broader passage agreement. But $107 oil and mutual energy targeting = pressure isn't producing negotiations, it's producing escalation.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: بوشهر + راس لفان ۲ بار. E3 حمایت نظامی. ۱۲ وزیر بیانیه. عربستان هشدار. آستانه هسته‌ای تنها مانده. بازیگران بیشتر، خروجی‌های کمتر.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. انرژی + بوشهر = فرسایش غیرممکن. اما کتائب مهلت = شکاف. IMO کریدور. موشک D19 ↑.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ثابت. E3 + ۱۲ وزیر = فشار. کتائب مهلت = پوشش. لبنان مذاکره. اما بوشهر + عربستان.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فروپاشی رژیم
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: ثابت. ۵ مقام. ۵,۳۰۰. شمال. اما کتائب = استقلال نه فروپاشی. سپاه مستقل. موشک ↑.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. E3 نظامی. ۱۲ وزیر. IMO. ماکرون. لبنان مذاکره. بوشهر = فشار روسیه.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کم. کتائب مهلت = اولین سیگنال. ۸ کشتی هرمز. لبنان مذاکره. IMO. اما تشدید نه مذاکره.

theoryEvaluation.title: Energy + nuclear war — crossing thresholds
theoryEvaluation.body: D19 crossed TWO new thresholds: (1) Bushehr nuclear plant projectile — first strike on an operating nuclear facility in this war. Rosatom suspended construction. IAEA warned against nuclear accident risk. (2) Ras Laffan hit TWICE — Qatar's entire LNG industry now threatened. Iran naming specific Gulf energy targets by name (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Both sides are destroying revenue sources AND approaching nuclear-adjacent escalation. IAEA Grossi: war cannot eliminate nuclear program. Isfahan enrichment status unknown. This is no longer just an energy war — it's approaching the nuclear threshold.

theoryEvaluation.title: Military — decapitation + missile resurgence
theoryEvaluation.body: 5 senior officials killed in ~60h. Israel striking northern Iran. But D19 missile count REVISED UP to 40 — highest since D10. 2nd Ras Laffan strike confirms Iran retains meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining further credibility. Hengaw: 5,300 killed. HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444. Multiple casualty sources now converging on devastating toll. Pentagon $200B+ = institutional preparation for extended war.

theoryEvaluation.title: Political — broadening coalition + first cracks
theoryEvaluation.body: THREE significant political developments: (1) E3 backing 'proportionate military defensive measures' = potential European military involvement. (2) 12 Arab/Islamic FM joint statement = broadest consensus. (3) Kataib Hezbollah conditional 5-day pause = FIRST CRACK in Iran's proxy network. Saudi military warning unchanged but now backed by multilateral statement. Qatar expelled attaches. IMO emergency meeting on safe corridor. Lebanon offering direct talks. The political landscape is bifurcating: more actors joining against Iran (E3, 12 FMs, Saudi) while Iran's proxy network shows first fractures (Kataib Hezbollah). This combination could accelerate either resolution or escalation.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: جنگ انرژی + هسته‌ای — عبور از آستانه
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: D19: دو آستانه جدید. بوشهر = اولین حمله به نیروگاه فعال. روس‌اتم متوقف. راس لفان ۲ بار = صنعت LNG قطر تهدید. ایران اهداف انرژی نام برد. IAEA: نمی‌توان حذف. اصفهان نامعلوم. دیگر فقط انرژی نیست — آستانه هسته‌ای.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: نظامی — سر بریدن + بازگشت موشک
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۵ مقام ~۶۰ ساعت. اما D19 موشک ۴۰ = بالاترین از D10. راس لفان ۲ بار = توانایی بالستیک. ادعای 'انبار سالم' D16 تقویت. هنگاو ۵,۳۰۰. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سیاسی — ائتلاف گسترده‌تر + اولین شکاف
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: E3 حمایت نظامی. ۱۲ وزیر بیانیه. کتائب مهلت = اولین شکاف شبکه نیابتی. عربستان + چندجانبه. قطر اخراج. IMO. لبنان مذاکره. دوگانگی: بیشتر علیه ایران + شکاف نیابتی = تسریع.

endstate.title: Most likely (42%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral accelerates with NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Bushehr projectile + Ras Laffan x2 + South Pars = energy war at max intensity. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = expanding belligerent pool. Either: (a) Saudi/E3 enter militarily, transforming into regional/international war; (b) Bushehr escalation triggers Russia diplomatic pressure that creates ceasefire opportunity; (c) Gulf states + E3 collectively force ceasefire to prevent nuclear accident + save economies; or (d) $120+ oil triggers global intervention. Multiple forcing mechanisms operating simultaneously with 48-72h decision windows.

endstate.title: Second (22%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition if energy threshold stabilizes. Kataib Hezbollah pause = first proxy crack could cascade. IMO corridor = partial economic normalization. Lebanon direct talks = first front potentially resolved. But Iran's D19 missile resurgence (40, highest since D10) + naming specific targets = not de-escalating. Only viable if both sides tacitly agree to pull back from energy/nuclear targeting.

endstate.title: Wild card (8%)
endstate.body: Regime fracture or nuclear escalation. 5 officials killed ~60h. 5,300 dead. Bushehr projectile approaches nuclear red line. IAEA: Isfahan enrichment status UNKNOWN. If enrichment facility damaged and fissile material released, international crisis. Alternatively, IRGC hardliners could push for nuclear breakout under cover of war chaos. Mojtaba Khamenei still hasn't appeared publicly.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ + بعد هسته‌ای. بوشهر + راس لفان ۲ بار. E3 + ۱۲ وزیر + عربستان. روسیه؟ آتش‌بس اجباری؟ ۴۸-۷۲ ساعت.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایش اگر انرژی ثابت شود. کتائب شکاف. IMO عادی‌سازی. لبنان مذاکره. اما موشک D19 ↑ = تشدید.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: فروپاشی یا هسته‌ای. ۵ مقام. بوشهر خط قرمز. اصفهان نامعلوم. شکست هسته‌ای؟ مجتبی غایب.

shippingRoutes.detail: UAE shut Habshan gas after debris. Turkish Airlines cancelled ALL regional flights until Mar 19+. Iran issued evacuation warnings for UAE energy sites + named specific targets (Al Hosn). Abu Dhabi gas facilities offline. Regional aviation in collapse. This route is permanently dead for duration of conflict.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed per on-ground intel despite official Turkish claims of neutrality. Turkey deployed F-16s and air defenses to Northern Cyprus. NATO intercepted 2 Iranian missiles over Turkish airspace (Gaziantep). Turkey–Iran land border effectively shut for commercial traffic. NATO missile over Gaziantep = Turkey is no longer a safe corridor.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Border needs fresh verification. CRITICAL: Israel now striking NORTHERN Iran — brings strikes closer to Armenian border/Tabriz corridor. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck (Hengaw). Bushehr strikes show geographic expansion of targeting. Military relocating to civilian spaces. Internet blackout 3 weeks. This route's viability is DECLINING as war expands north.

Eastern borders not directly in combat zone but infrastructure is minimal. Pakistan border areas have own security challenges. Afghanistan route non-viable. Turkmenistan transit requires diplomatic arrangements that don't exist. No established book logistics on any of these routes.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: حبشان بسته. ترکیش لغو. هشدار تخلیه + اهداف نام‌برده. هواپیمایی فروپاشی.
حملات شمال ایران = نزدیک مرز. بوشهر = گسترش جغرافیایی. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان. کاهش.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. Iran imports virtually all pulp. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed → no imports. Existing warehouse stock only. South Pars strike + Ras Laffan x2 = energy crisis worsening.
Internet blackout: 3 weeks. Hengaw confirms phone checks at checkpoints, arrests for sharing info. Online book sales ↓80%+. Total communications isolation.
Power outages: Sustained and WORSENING. Bushehr region struck (NPP + airport). Israel striking northern Iran. 178 cities across 25 provinces (Hengaw). Military in schools/dormitories.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Israel expanding strikes. Bushehr now targeted. Cultural infrastructure at extreme risk across entire country.
56+ cultural sites damaged. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. HRANA: 3,114. Strikes across 25 provinces = virtually no safe area for publishing operations.
New title production: Effectively halted. Only pre-war warehouse stock. Distribution networks non-functional. Military using civilian spaces = printing facilities at risk.

Assessment: Iranian publishing industry in existential crisis. Energy war escalation (South Pars + Bushehr) will worsen power further. Nuclear risk adds new dimension. Recovery timeline: years minimum.
publishingStatus_fa: کاغذ: بحرانی. واردات متوقف. پارس جنوبی + راس لفان ۲ بار = بحران انرژی.
قطع اینترنت: ۳ هفته. بازرسی گوشی. فروش آنلاین ↓۸۰٪+.
قطع برق: بدتر. بوشهر (NPP + فرودگاه). شمال ایران. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان.
اصفهان + شیراز + بوشهر: بمباران. گسترش. زیرساخت فرهنگی.
تولید متوقف. نظامی در مدارس. چاپخانه‌ها در خطر.
بحران وجودی. خطر هسته‌ای بعد جدید. بازسازی: سال‌ها.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. Turkish Airlines cancelled flights. Regional aviation collapsing. Iran naming UAE targets = risk elevated further.

BEST ALTERNATIVE: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) border — status needs fresh verification. Israel striking NORTHERN Iran + Bushehr = geographic expansion brings strikes closer to Armenian border. Domestic leg through 25 provinces being struck. Risk increasing.

SUPPLY SOURCE DETERIORATING: Military relocating into civilian spaces. Warehouse access compromised. South Pars + Bushehr strikes = worsening power/gas crisis. 178 cities struck across 25 provinces. HRANA confirms 3,114 killed.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. Payment via KEMCO SARL viable in principle but Qatar expelled attaches + Saudi military warning + E3 military backing = regional compliance environment at tightest point.
FINANCIAL: Rial in freefall. Oil $107 close. Fed held rates. KEMCO/French banking under increased scrutiny. E3 military involvement could trigger new European compliance requirements.
WINDOW CLOSING: Pre-war stocks depleting. Military in civilian spaces. Armenia route declining. Bushehr nuclear dimension adds new risk layer. Every day of delay reduces accessible inventory.
impactIranfarhang_fa: مسیر اصلی مرده: ترکیش لغو. ایران اهداف امارات نام برد.
ارمنستان: حملات شمال + بوشهر = گسترش جغرافیایی. خطر افزایش.
منبع تأمین بدتر: نظامی در مدارس. HRANA ۳,۱۱۴. ۱۷۸ شهر.
OFAC: معافیت معتبر. اما قطر + عربستان + E3 = سخت‌ترین.
مالی: ریال سقوط. نفت ۱۰۷. E3 = الزامات اروپایی جدید؟
پنجره بسته: موجودی کم. ارمنستان کاهش. بوشهر بعد جدید.
prepIranfarhang: Activate Armenia route exploration: Contact Yerevan-based logistics contacts. Assess Agarak/Norduz border crossing capacity for book freight.
Identify Tehran warehouse partners willing/able to load and dispatch to Armenian border despite domestic conditions (no internet, active strikes, military in civilian spaces).
Pre-negotiate Yerevan→port (Poti, Georgia or Batumi)→sea freight→US routing and costs.
Accelerate procurement of any accessible pre-war inventory — prioritize high-demand university titles.
Brief university library clients on supply disruption timeline and potential delays. Set expectations for 3-6 month procurement window.
Monitor KEMCO payment channel capacity — confirm French bank compliance posture, especially re E3 military involvement and new compliance requirements.
Prepare contingency for total supply interruption lasting 6+ months.
Monitor Bushehr/nuclear developments — any radiological incident would trigger new sanctions/compliance regime globally.
prepIranfarhang_fa: بررسی مسیر ارمنستان: تماس با شرکای لجستیکی ایروان.
شناسایی انبارهای تهران آماده ارسال به مرز ارمنستان.
signalsIranfarhang: CRITICAL: Bushehr nuclear plant — any radiological incident triggers entirely new sanctions/compliance landscape. IAEA monitoring. Rosatom suspended.
CRITICAL: Israel strikes on NORTHERN Iran — if sustained, Armenia border route viability drops sharply. Watch Tabriz/East Azerbaijan.
CRITICAL: Iran follow-through on named Gulf energy targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) — if struck, regional logistics completely collapse.
WATCH: E3 military involvement timeline — if European forces deploy, new compliance requirements likely for Iran-connected trade.
WATCH: Saudi military action decision — if Saudi enters war, ALL Middle East logistics shut down.
WATCH: Ras Laffan damage assessment (hit TWICE) — duration of Qatar LNG outage determines regional trajectory.
WATCH: Kataib Hezbollah pause outcome — if conditions met, proxy fracture could cascade to other groups.
WATCH: IMO safe maritime corridor — if established, partial Hormuz normalization possible.
signalsIranfarhang_fa: بحرانی: بوشهر هسته‌ای — حادثه = تحریم جدید. IAEA. روس‌اتم.
بحرانی: شمال ایران — ارمنستان خطر. تبریز.
بحرانی: اهداف نام‌برده خلیج — فروپاشی لجستیک.
impactKIP: Iran-UAE corridor: DEAD. Turkish Airlines cancelled. Abu Dhabi Habshan shut. Iran named UAE's Al Hosn as target. IRGC: UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Risk maximum.
UAE asset risk: HIGH. Habshan gas shut. Iran naming specific UAE targets by name. Qatar expelled attaches = diplomatic rupture spreading. E3 military backing could accelerate UAE compliance actions.
Hormuz: ↓97% traffic. 8 vessels Monday (~double). China-linked transiting via Iranian waters. IMO emergency meeting — safe corridor proposed. But Iran threatened more energy strikes + named targets.

QATAR RUPTURED: Ras Laffan struck TWICE. Attaches expelled. Qatar LNG industry threatened. Force majeure on all shipments since Mar 4. This eliminates a diplomatic channel and Qatar's economic base simultaneously.

Banking: Qatar rupture + Saudi warning + E3 military backing = regional banking compliance at MAXIMUM tightness. Any Iran-connected financial flows face extreme scrutiny. E3 involvement may trigger new European compliance requirements.

Physical security: Iran named specific energy targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Bushehr nuclear dimension adds radiological risk. Operating environment extremely dangerous. Regional aviation collapsing.
impactKIP_fa: مسیر ایران-امارات: مرده. ایران الحصن نام برد. سپاه: هدف مشروع.
دارایی‌ها: بالا. حبشان بسته. اهداف نام‌برده. E3 = تسریع اقدام.
هرمز: ↓۹۷٪. ۸ کشتی. IMO کریدور. اما تهدید بیشتر.
قطر شکاف: راس لفان ۲ بار + اخراج. فورس ماژور. کانال دیپلماتیک از بین.
بانکداری: قطر + عربستان + E3 = حداکثر سخت‌گیری. الزامات اروپایی جدید؟
امنیت: اهداف نام‌برده. بوشهر هسته‌ای = خطر رادیولوژیک. بسیار خطرناک.
prepKIP: Assess all KIP assets in UAE for exposure to both military risk and potential asset freeze. Iran has named specific UAE targets.
Establish emergency communication protocols that don't depend on Iranian internet (satellite phone, third-country relay).
Diversify banking away from UAE — consider Oman, Turkey, or other jurisdictions. E3 military involvement may trigger new European compliance requirements.
Suspend any new UAE-bound shipments until Hormuz reopens and airport operations normalize.
Prepare legal contingency for potential UAE asset freeze or enhanced sanctions screening.
Identify alternative logistics hubs: Oman (Muscat/Sohar), Turkey (Mersin), Georgia (Poti/Batumi).
Monitor insurance market — Ras Laffan x2 + Bushehr nuclear will cause massive premium increases across Gulf.
Brief all personnel in UAE on physical security — Iran has named specific facilities. Avoid proximity to any energy infrastructure.
Monitor Bushehr nuclear situation — any radiological incident would trigger new global sanctions/compliance regime affecting all Iran-connected business.
prepKIP_fa: ارزیابی دارایی‌های KIP — ایران اهداف امارات نام برد.
پروتکل ارتباطی اضطراری بدون اینترنت ایران.
بیمه — راس لفان ۲ بار + بوشهر = جهش حق بیمه.
امنیت — ایران تأسیسات نام برده. دور از زیرساخت انرژی.
نظارت بوشهر — حادثه = تحریم جهانی جدید.
signalsKIP: CRITICAL: Bushehr nuclear — any radiological incident transforms entire sanctions/compliance landscape globally. Rosatom suspended. IAEA monitoring.
CRITICAL: Iran follow-through on named targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) — next 24-48h determines if energy war escalates to named targets.
CRITICAL: Saudi Arabia military action decision — if Saudi enters, all Gulf business operations shut down entirely.
CRITICAL: E3 military deployment — if European forces deploy, new compliance requirements for Iran-connected trade likely.
WATCH: Ras Laffan damage assessment (hit TWICE) — duration of Qatar LNG outage determines regional trajectory.
WATCH: Iran Hormuz traffic (8 vessels Monday) — increasing = possible negotiated passage. Decreasing = full blockade.
WATCH: IMO safe corridor proposal — if adopted, partial Hormuz normalization enables some trade.
WATCH: Kataib Hezbollah pause outcome — proxy fracture could cascade.
WATCH: Insurance market — Ras Laffan x2 + Bushehr will cause massive premium increases.
signalsKIP_fa: بحرانی: بوشهر هسته‌ای — حادثه = تحریم جهانی. روس‌اتم. IAEA.
